texto: Poetry is the lighthouse of lifeGuiding the lost from a stormy sea.Without it's presence darkness prevailsKeeping us from all we can be.People write poetry because they have no choiceAnswering to the call of their gift.Where some tend to pull their readers downOthers compose to give them a lift.excerpts from The Power of Poetry by Tom Zart
explicacao: Citação de Zart sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Poetry is the lighthouse of lifeGuiding the lost from a stormy sea.Without it's presence darkness…” articula reflexao, poetry-quotes, poetry em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e termino.
